text: Absolutely love this app! Tracks my runs perfectly and the GPS is super accurate.
Battery drain is insane. My phone dies 3 hours into a workout. Unusable.
The sync with Apple Health stopped working after the last update. Please fix!
Best fitness tracker I've used. The heart rate monitor is spot on.
Keeps crashing when I try to view my weekly stats. iPhone 15, latest iOS.
Premium subscription is way too expensive for what you get. $15/month is ridiculous.
Love the sleep tracking feature. Finally understand my sleep patterns.
GPS takes forever to lock on. Sometimes 5+ minutes before I can start a run.
The UI is clean and intuitive. Easy to navigate even for beginners.
Crashes constantly on my Android. Lost 2 weeks of data. Absolutely furious.
Accurate calorie counting. Lost 8 pounds following the meal plan suggestions.
No Apple Watch integration. Competitors have had this for years. Come on.
The workout recommendations are actually really smart. Adapts to my fitness level.
Sync is broken. My data from yesterday still hasn't synced to the cloud.
Great app but the free tier is too limited. You need premium for basic features.
Heart rate readings are way off compared to my chest strap. 20+ bpm difference.
Customer support is excellent. Got a response within an hour and they fixed my issue.
App UI is dated and clunky. Competitors look so much better in 2026.
The challenge feature with friends keeps me motivated. Best part of the app.
Terrible battery optimization. Other fitness apps don't drain my battery like this.
The route maps are beautiful and detailed. Love seeing my runs on the map.
Subscription price increased without any warning. That's just wrong.
Personal records tracking is great. Love seeing my improvement over time.
The app crashes every time I try to export my data. Very frustrating.
Widgets are useful but would love more customization options.
GPS accuracy on cycling routes is exceptional. Better than Strava for me.
App constantly asks for reviews and permissions. Stop interrupting my workouts!
The interval training timer is perfect. Exactly what I needed.
My workout history disappeared after an update. All my progress is gone.
Would give 5 stars but the price keeps going up. Not worth premium anymore.
Absolutely the best running app. Tried 10+ apps and this one wins easily.
Bluetooth disconnects from my earbuds every few minutes during workouts.
The coaching plans are well designed. Finished my first 5K following the plan!
Steps counted are way off from my Garmin. Showing 30% fewer steps.
Dark mode is great for nighttime workouts. Small thing but appreciated.
No offline mode. If I lose signal mid-run my data doesn't get saved properly.
The nutrition tracking is surprisingly good for a fitness app.
This app has completely transformed my fitness routine. Down 20 lbs!
Freezes at the end of a workout when saving. Have to force close and lose data.
Integration with Spotify works flawlessly. Love controlling music from the app.
The social features are dead. Nobody uses them. Focus on core tracking instead.
Elevation data is inaccurate on hilly routes. Shows flat when it's not.
The weekly summary emails are a nice touch. Keeps me accountable.
Cancelled premium after prices went up again. Free version is almost pointless.
Really good app for beginners. Clear explanations of all the metrics.
The app logged a 2 hour workout I never did. Data is clearly corrupted.
Voice coaching during runs is super helpful. Keeps my pace consistent.
Login issues since last week. Reset password 4 times and still can't get in.
Good app overall but needs better Wear OS support urgently.
The pace alerts work perfectly. Never overexert myself anymore.
